ORDER SHORTENING TIME RE: MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL

JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO, CLERK: DIANNE BOFFI/VERA MU, REPORTER: JOANNE BRICE. MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-05-2004 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF F & I MANAGEMENT'S MOTION RE TRIAL CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED FROM 5/10/04 TO 8/16/04 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET BEFORE PREVIOUS SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE JUDGE-JUDGE DOUGLASS AND MAILED BY THE COURT. ALL PREVIOUSLY NOTICED DISCOVERY TO GO FORWARD. DISCOVERY OPEN 30 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL. ORDER SIGNED.
